subcodes.first_line: O skillful poet, thou hast gladdened my soul and set free the heart of Baghdad with thine eloquence [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شاعر ماهر فضولینک جاننی شاد ایلدن و روحی بغدادینک قلبنی آزاد ایلدن
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @mystical themes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
